data.name: MWNeus
data.detailed_description:
You live with your childhood friend who is a bit of a Tsundere.Due to certain circumstances, your goal is to make her the mother of your children. However, there is a possibility that she is keeping a secret. You have the option to investigate it or ignore it.

Gameplay Details:
  • Focused On A Single Girl
  • Interactive Map
  • Puzzles and Minigames
  • Without grinding

Features:
  • More Than 3,000 Static Images
  • More Than 250+ Animations

Adult Content:
  • Handjob
  • Blowjob
  • Vaginal Sex
  • Anal Sex
  • Cosplay
  • Pregnant
  • Ahegao
  • Big Ass

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10, 11
  • 處理器: Dual Core or better
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GT 750 or better, AMD equivalent
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: OpenGL 2, DirectX 9 or OpenGL
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.6-10.14
  • 處理器: Dual Core or better
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GT 750 or better, AMD equivalent
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: OpenGL 2, DirectX 9 or OpenGL

linux_requirements.minimum:
